category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes OpenImageIO as reading, writing, and processing images in many formats for VFX applications.
source_facts.description: Library for reading, processing and writing images
docs_sources: Official GitHub README identifies OpenImageIO documentation as the best starting point for APIs and component programs.
source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/AcademySoftwareFoundation/OpenImageIO, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies image reading, processing, and writing library.
source_facts.executables lists CLI tools including iconvert, idiff, iinfo, maketx, and oiiotool; official GitHub description targets VFX applications.
